text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I run into Mayano Top Gun on my
way to the office.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, there was a character that looked just like
you in last night's episode of...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um, I mean! I was watching a show, and it was...
really good! That's all!
choice_data_list:
So what you're saying is you didn't get much
sleep.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... you see... there were lots of...
grown-up scenes in it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! Just thinking about it makes my heart race! I
don't think I'll be able to sleep tonight either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I imagine it was just your typical teen TV show,
but whatever the reason, it was enough to have
kept Mayano from sleeping.
